meta.notes: T1/T2/T3/T4 executed in a single continuous bash call — WALL_START and WALL_END in the same shell, no CC activity between runs. LLM overhead 0.134s is measurement noise. T4 --variations 3 hit degraded path: Anthropic ReadTimeout (30.1s) → OpenAI fallback returned invalid JSON array → fell back to single-caption Anthropic call (16.0s); returned 1 variation instead of 3. Token delta from session JSONL (14:21:40–14:24:27 UTC window, 60s pre-buffer); covers 8 CC messages.

test_input.name: pasta-tutorial-brief
test_input.description: video tutorial: how to cook perfect pasta at home — tested 5 different techniques

task.name: social-posting
task.purpose: Generate platform-optimized captions and hashtags for social media posts using LLM; supports single captions and A/B variation sets across X, Instagram, TikTok
task.expected_output: JSON with caption, hashtags, full_post per test case; array of variation objects for T4

install.notes: No install step — skill pre-installed at ~/Pikabot/nova3-agent-skills/social-posting/.

asset_acquisition.notes: No assets — pure LLM skill, no downloads required.

steps.name: t1_x_casual
steps.notes: platform=x tone=casual exit=0. llm_s=6.6 (anthropic). caption_len=172 hashtags=2 (['#pasta','#cooking']) full_post_len=188. Caption within X 280-char limit. Contrarian take style.

steps.name: t2_instagram_casual
steps.notes: platform=instagram tone=casual exit=0. llm_s=18.0 (anthropic). caption_len=990 hashtags_count=30. APP formula (Agree→Promise→Preview) applied. Longer response = longer LLM call vs T1/T3.

steps.name: t3_tiktok_funny
steps.notes: platform=tiktok tone=funny exit=0. llm_s=7.2 (anthropic). caption_len=76 hashtags_count=4. Short-form hook format as expected (<100 chars). Gen-Z register used ('fr', 'lied to you').

steps.name: t4_instagram_variations3
steps.notes: platform=instagram tone=casual --variations 3 exit=0. llm_s=74.8 (30.1+28.7+16.0 across 3 calls). variations_returned=1 (expected 3). caption_len=910 hashtags_count=30. ⚠️ Degraded path: Anthropic ReadTimeout after 30.1s → OpenAI fallback (28.7s) returned invalid JSON array → fell back to single-caption Anthropic call (16.0s). Root cause: proxy timeout, not token truncation (differs from pikabot T4 which was truncation-driven).

execution.notes: execution.total_s = T1+T2+T3+T4 (6.748+18.075+7.302+74.849). T1/T3 fast (6-7s, short outputs). T2 slower (18s, long Instagram caption + 30 hashtags). T4 dominated (74.8s) due to Anthropic proxy timeout + OpenAI fallback failure + retry. Skill version f8353cf fixes --variations max_tokens scaling but did not prevent the proxy ReadTimeout that triggered the fallback chain.

delivery.notes: No CDN upload — local delivery. T1 stdout 0.8KB, T2 stdout 3.4KB, T3 stdout 0.7KB, T4 stdout 3.3KB. Total ~8.2KB.

tokens._note: Nulled: extract-cc-tokens.py reported session-cumulative totals, not per-task usage. Token data included other tasks from the same Claude Code session.

cost._note: Nulled: derived from unreliable session-cumulative token counts.
